title: Epic RPG: Party Hud
description: Party HUD shows nearby players’ health bars.
body:
Party HUD is a lightweight Forge mod that enhances multiplayer gameplay with a fully customizable party-style HUD. It displays nearby players' health bars with multiple configurable styles and dynamic colors that reflect status effects like poison, freezing, or regeneration.

Allows pinning specific teammates so their bars remain always visible, even at long distances or in other dimensions. Uses efficient client-server networking to sync the full list of connected players and real-time health data.

Key Features:

- 3 HUD styles: Modern, Compact, Standard (soon more)
- Configurable positions (8 screen locations)
- Effect-based colors (poison=green, wither=black, etc.)
- Health text: values, percentages, or none
- Optional names and armor display
- You can change the size of the HUD
- Maximum 6 pinned players (4 by default)

**Online players list**
- Online players appear in this window which opens with the letter "H"
- Online players will only be visible in this HUD if they are within a 64-block range.
![Online players](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e30f3f3b5ea49e5fd4ce0d26ded827cba8c40eb5_0.webp)


**Players on the favorites list**
- All players on the favorites list will always be visible
![Players on the favorites list](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbddf4cd31b3768003b0d5a077252943b8814a04_0.webp)
